Description: RQ100	Requirements shall be managed in a 3rd party requirements management tool such as DOORS.
Reasoning: The test step directly references DOORS and demonstrates use of a 3rd-party tool, but it only covers a specific event flow rather than full requirement management behaviors.

Description: RQ101	Non-requirement artifacts shall be managed in 3rd party tools such as Rational Rose or Clear case
Reasoning: None of the provided test cases mention or assert management of non-requirement artifacts in third-party tools or specific tools named (Rational Rose, ClearCase). Tests focus on tracing, subscriber behavior, event messages, and requirement lifecycle, so there is no evidence of integrations, management operations (create/update/delete), error handling, synchronization, or authorization behaviors required by RQ101.
